title: PricingResult
description: Pricing data for a cover product across all staking pools, including per-pool target prices and a weighted average.

pricePerPool.description: Array of pricing data per staking pool

weightedAveragePrice.description: The capacity-weighted average price across all pools, expressed as basis points (0-10,000)

PoolPricing.description: Pricing information for a single staking pool

targetPrice.description: The target annual price for this pool, expressed as basis points (0-10,000)
